variants.title: Fleetguard AF1659 Air Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P136254
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1659 air filter offers more filtering surface than standard air filters, is located above the engine to draw cool, clean air, needs less maintenance time and cost, and has easy filter removal.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%

variants.title: Donaldson P136254 Air Primary, Round
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P136254 Air Primary, Round provides clean, efficient airflow for engines by trapping airborne contaminants. Its round design maximizes filtration surface area while maintaining high airflow rates. Perfect for heavy-duty applications, this air primary filter enhances engine longevity and supports consistent performance.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 99.9%
